$comment: Curator-decision batch seeding the hapi:display_name resolution policy (ADR-018 § Display name migration). Canonical Anglicised display forms per ADR-016. Each decision attaches a curator display_name claim (P14 → curatorial Group, P70i → this batch document, kind=curator_decision_batch) to a per-source :Ruler node. POC slice: a handful of rulers (incl. the deterministic-matcher pairs). Rulers without a decision here are intentionally unrenderable until a curator reviews them (fail-loud default).
rationale: Initial canonical Anglicised display forms per ADR-016 (Conventional English Display Form).
